edges.evidence_quote: Like Independent Soldiers , Indian Posse , United Nations , Bo-Gars, Native Syndicate , and Crazy Dragons, NPF has an interprovincial presence.

edges.evidence_quote: Two of these gangs were made up of Haitian Canadians who called themselves the "Bloods" and the "Crips" after two prominent American gangs .
edges.context: Bloods and Crips took over sex trafficking in Toronto after NPF moved west, but no direct relationship between NPF and these gangs is stated.
